testcase.name: test_mark_single_notification_read

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected ok=True, got: {'message': 'Bildirim okundu olarak işaretlendi', 'notification_id': '28612823-bf0f-4221-8491-e44c4e804737'} assert None is True + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf96eaa774200>('ok') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf96eaa774200> = {'message': 'Bildirim okundu olarak işaretlendi', 'notification_id': '28612823-bf0f-4221-8491-e44c4e804737'}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_notification_bugs_fixes.py:219: in test_mark_single_notification_read assert result.get("ok") is True, f"Expected ok=True, got: {result}" E AssertionError: Expected ok=True, got: {'message': 'Bildirim okundu olarak işaretlendi', 'notification_id': '28612823-bf0f-4221-8491-e44c4e804737'} E assert None is True E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf96eaa774200>('ok') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf96eaa774200> = {'message': 'Bildirim okundu olarak işaretlendi', 'notification_id': '28612823-bf0f-4221-8491-e44c4e804737'}.get
